frontmatter.name: ui-ux-pro-max
frontmatter.description: UI/UX and product-site design intelligence. 67 styles, 161 palettes, 57 font pairings, site architecture, page patterns, section patterns, 25 charts, 16 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, Astro, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Nuxt, Nuxt UI, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Jetpack Compose, Three.js, Angular, Laravel). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: product website, landing page, feature page, pricing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, marketplace, portfolio, blog, mobile app, .html, .tsx, .vue, .svelte. Elements: sitemap, navigation, hero, feature grid, pricing table, trust proof, button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Topics: Claude Design prompts, color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient.

title: UI/UX Pro Max - Design Intelligence
description: Comprehensive design guide for product websites, web apps, and mobile apps. Contains 67 styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, site architecture, page patterns, section patterns, 99 UX guidelines, and 25 chart types across 16 technology stacks. Searchable database with priority-based recommendations.
